states.name: Idle
states.description: No level/frequency transition in progress. CurrentLevel and CurrentFrequency, if non-null/non-zero, represent the actual steady device output. RemainingTime is 0.
invariants: CurrentLevel == null OR (CurrentLevel >= MinLevel AND (MaxLevel == null OR CurrentLevel <= MaxLevel))
CurrentFrequency == 0 OR (MinFrequency != null AND MaxFrequency != null AND CurrentFrequency >= MinFrequency AND CurrentFrequency <= MaxFrequency)

states.name: LevelTransition
states.description: A time-bounded movement of CurrentLevel is in progress due to MoveToLevel, Step, MoveToLevelWithOnOff or StepWithOnOff. RemainingTime > 0 counts down in 0.1 s units. Movement may be linear; device MAY ignore requested timing if it does not support variable rate.
invariants: CurrentLevel == null OR (CurrentLevel >= MinLevel AND (MaxLevel == null OR CurrentLevel <= MaxLevel))

states.name: LevelContinuousMove
states.description: A rate-based continuous move of CurrentLevel is in progress due to Move or MoveWithOnOff. RemainingTime is not defined as a countdown for these commands; it MAY remain 0 or be implementation-specific, but spec does not require RemainingTime usage.
invariants: CurrentLevel == null OR (CurrentLevel >= MinLevel AND (MaxLevel == null OR CurrentLevel <= MaxLevel))

states.name: FrequencySteady
states.description: No frequency transition semantics are defined beyond an immediate assignment; CurrentFrequency reflects last commanded or approximated value and device is not conceptually transitioning in frequency.
invariants: CurrentFrequency == 0 OR (MinFrequency != null AND MaxFrequency != null AND CurrentFrequency >= MinFrequency AND CurrentFrequency <= MaxFrequency)

states.name: ErrorConstraint
states.description: Logical error condition where the last command (e.g., MoveToClosestFrequency) responded with CONSTRAINT_ERROR due to impossible constraints. Attributes remain unchanged from previous non-error state.

transitions.guard_condition: MoveToLevel.Level <= 254 AND (FeatureMap.OO == 0 OR implemented(OnOffCluster) == false OR process_Options_result.allowExecution == true) AND MoveToLevel.TransitionTime != 0xFFFF
actions: for each bit i in OptionsBitmap: if MoveToLevel.OptionsMask[i] == 1 then tempOptions[i] := MoveToLevel.OptionsOverride[i] else tempOptions[i] := Options[i]
if process_Options_result.allowExecution == false then /* cluster-specific: no changes to CurrentLevel */ exit transition

if MoveToLevel.TransitionTime != null then duration_ds := MoveToLevel.TransitionTime else if attribute_present(OnOffTransitionTime) then duration_ds := OnOffTransitionTime else duration_ds := MIN_PRACTICAL_TIME_ds
if device_supports_variable_rate == false then duration_ds := MIN_PRACTICAL_TIME_ds
transitions.timing_requirements: RemainingTime decrements in 0.1 s units until 0; movement completes over 'duration_ds' subject to device variable-rate support.

actions: execute actions of Idle→LevelTransition.MoveToLevel (restarting transition with new target and duration)
transitions.timing_requirements: New MoveToLevel replaces any existing level transition.

transitions.guard_condition: MoveToLevel.Level <= 254 AND (FeatureMap.OO == 0 OR implemented(OnOffCluster) == false OR process_Options_result.allowExecution == true) AND MoveToLevel.TransitionTime != 0xFFFF

transitions.timing_requirements: TimerTick_100ms occurs every 0.1 s; RemainingTime decremented each tick.
Intermediate transition while timed movement in progress.

transitions.guard_condition: Move.Rate != 0 AND (Move.MoveMode in {Up, Down}) AND (FeatureMap.OO == 0 OR implemented(OnOffCluster) == false OR process_Options_result.allowExecution == true)
actions: if Move.Rate == 0 then /* send_default_response(INVALID_COMMAND) in actual protocol; no state change */ exit transition
for each bit i in OptionsBitmap: if Move.OptionsMask[i] == 1 then tempOptions[i] := Move.OptionsOverride[i] else tempOptions[i] := Options[i]
if process_Options_result.allowExecution == false then exit transition
if Move.Rate != null then effRate := Move.Rate else if attribute_present(DefaultMoveRate) AND DefaultMoveRate != null then effRate := DefaultMoveRate else effRate := MAX_PRACTICAL_RATE
if device_supports_variable_rate == false then effRate := MAX_PRACTICAL_RATE
if Move.MoveMode == Up then start_continuous_move(CurrentLevel, DeviceMaxLevel, effRate) else start_continuous_move(CurrentLevel, DeviceMinLevel, effRate)
transitions.timing_requirements: Rate is in units per second; device MAY ignore rate if it does not support variable rate.

transitions.guard_condition: (ContinuousMoveDirection == Up AND CurrentLevel >= DeviceMaxLevel) OR (ContinuousMoveDirection == Down AND CurrentLevel <= DeviceMinLevel)
transitions.timing_requirements: Automatic when level reaches device limit.

transitions.guard_condition: Step.StepSize != 0 AND (Step.StepMode in {Up, Down}) AND (FeatureMap.OO == 0 OR implemented(OnOffCluster) == false OR process_Options_result.allowExecution == true)
actions: if Step.StepSize == 0 then /* INVALID_COMMAND; no state change */ exit transition
for each bit i in OptionsBitmap: if Step.OptionsMask[i] == 1 then tempOptions[i] := Step.OptionsOverride[i] else tempOptions[i] := Options[i]
if process_Options_result.allowExecution == false then exit transition
if Step.StepMode == Up then target := min(CurrentLevel + delta, DeviceMaxLevel) else target := max(CurrentLevel - delta, DeviceMinLevel)
if Step.TransitionTime != null then baseDuration_ds := Step.TransitionTime else baseDuration_ds := MIN_PRACTICAL_TIME_ds
if actualDelta < Step.StepSize AND Step.StepSize > 0 then duration_ds := (baseDuration_ds * actualDelta) / Step.StepSize else duration_ds := baseDuration_ds
if device_supports_variable_rate == false then duration_ds := MIN_PRACTICAL_TIME_ds
transitions.timing_requirements: Step duration is proportional to actualDelta/StepSize if clamped at min/max.

transitions.guard_condition: (FeatureMap.OO == 0 OR implemented(OnOffCluster) == false OR process_Options_result.allowExecution == true)
actions: for each bit i in OptionsBitmap: if Stop.OptionsMask[i] == 1 then tempOptions[i] := Stop.OptionsOverride[i] else tempOptions[i] := Options[i]
if process_Options_result.allowExecution == false then exit transition
/* No transition in progress in Idle; no-op for level movement */

transitions.guard_condition: (FeatureMap.OO == 0 OR implemented(OnOffCluster) == false OR process_Options_result.allowExecution == true)
actions: for each bit i in OptionsBitmap: if Stop.OptionsMask[i] == 1 then tempOptions[i] := Stop.OptionsOverride[i] else tempOptions[i] := Options[i]
if process_Options_result.allowExecution == false then exit transition
transitions.timing_requirements: Stop SHALL immediately terminate ongoing LevelTransition.

transitions.guard_condition: (FeatureMap.OO == 0 OR implemented(OnOffCluster) == false OR process_Options_result.allowExecution == true)
actions: for each bit i in OptionsBitmap: if Stop.OptionsMask[i] == 1 then tempOptions[i] := Stop.OptionsOverride[i] else tempOptions[i] := Options[i]
if process_Options_result.allowExecution == false then exit transition
transitions.timing_requirements: Stop SHALL immediately terminate ongoing LevelContinuousMove.

transitions.guard_condition: MoveToLevelWithOnOff.Level <= 254 AND implemented(OnOffCluster) == true AND FeatureMap.OO == 1 AND MoveToLevelWithOnOff.TransitionTime != 0xFFFF
actions: /* Same behavior as MoveToLevel, plus On/Off linkage */
execute actions of Idle→LevelTransition.MoveToLevel with this payload
/* On/Off linkage applied at final level */
transitions.timing_requirements: Same as MoveToLevel.

transitions.guard_condition: TransitionType == MoveToLevelWithOnOff AND RemainingTime > 0 AND RemainingTime - 1 == 0
actions: if implemented(OnOffCluster) then { if CurrentLevel > DeviceMinLevel then OnOffCluster.OnOff := TRUE; if CurrentLevel == DeviceMinLevel then OnOffCluster.OnOff := FALSE }
transitions.timing_requirements: OnOff adjustment occurs when transition completes.

transitions.guard_condition: MoveWithOnOff.Rate != 0 AND (MoveWithOnOff.MoveMode in {Up, Down}) AND implemented(OnOffCluster) == true AND FeatureMap.OO == 1
actions: for each bit i in OptionsBitmap: if MoveWithOnOff.OptionsMask[i] == 1 then tempOptions[i] := MoveWithOnOff.OptionsOverride[i] else tempOptions[i] := Options[i]
if process_Options_result.allowExecution == false then exit transition

if MoveWithOnOff.Rate != null then effRate := MoveWithOnOff.Rate else if attribute_present(DefaultMoveRate) AND DefaultMoveRate != null then effRate := DefaultMoveRate else effRate := MAX_PRACTICAL_RATE
if device_supports_variable_rate == false then effRate := MAX_PRACTICAL_RATE
if MoveWithOnOff.MoveMode == Up then start_continuous_move(CurrentLevel, DeviceMaxLevel, effRate) else start_continuous_move(CurrentLevel, DeviceMinLevel, effRate)
transitions.timing_requirements: Same as Move.

transitions.guard_condition: TransitionType == MoveWithOnOff AND ((ContinuousMoveDirection == Up AND CurrentLevel >= DeviceMaxLevel) OR (ContinuousMoveDirection == Down AND CurrentLevel <= DeviceMinLevel))
actions: if implemented(OnOffCluster) then { if CurrentLevel > DeviceMinLevel then OnOffCluster.OnOff := TRUE; if CurrentLevel == DeviceMinLevel then OnOffCluster.OnOff := FALSE }
transitions.timing_requirements: OnOff change occurs when level reaches min or above min while in MoveWithOnOff.

transitions.guard_condition: StepWithOnOff.StepSize != 0 AND (StepWithOnOff.StepMode in {Up, Down}) AND implemented(OnOffCluster) == true AND FeatureMap.OO == 1
actions: for each bit i in OptionsBitmap: if StepWithOnOff.OptionsMask[i] == 1 then tempOptions[i] := StepWithOnOff.OptionsOverride[i] else tempOptions[i] := Options[i]
if process_Options_result.allowExecution == false then exit transition
if StepWithOnOff.StepMode == Up then target := min(CurrentLevel + delta, DeviceMaxLevel) else target := max(CurrentLevel - delta, DeviceMinLevel)
if StepWithOnOff.TransitionTime != null then baseDuration_ds := StepWithOnOff.TransitionTime else baseDuration_ds := MIN_PRACTICAL_TIME_ds
if actualDelta < StepWithOnOff.StepSize AND StepWithOnOff.StepSize > 0 then duration_ds := (baseDuration_ds * actualDelta) / StepWithOnOff.StepSize else duration_ds := baseDuration_ds
if device_supports_variable_rate == false then duration_ds := MIN_PRACTICAL_TIME_ds
transitions.timing_requirements: Same timing semantics as Step.

transitions.guard_condition: TransitionType == StepWithOnOff AND RemainingTime > 0 AND RemainingTime - 1 == 0
actions: if implemented(OnOffCluster) then { if CurrentLevel > DeviceMinLevel then OnOffCluster.OnOff := TRUE; if CurrentLevel == DeviceMinLevel then OnOffCluster.OnOff := FALSE }
transitions.timing_requirements: OnOff linkage applied at the end of step transition.

actions: for each bit i in OptionsBitmap: if StopWithOnOff.OptionsMask[i] == 1 then tempOptions[i] := StopWithOnOff.OptionsOverride[i] else tempOptions[i] := Options[i]
if process_Options_result.allowExecution == false then exit transition
/* No level transition active in Idle; nothing to stop. Original OnOff behavior is as command that started a transition. */
transitions.timing_requirements: Identical stopping semantics to Stop for both base and 'with On/Off' commands.

actions: for each bit i in OptionsBitmap: if StopWithOnOff.OptionsMask[i] == 1 then tempOptions[i] := StopWithOnOff.OptionsOverride[i] else tempOptions[i] := Options[i]
if process_Options_result.allowExecution == false then exit transition
transitions.timing_requirements: Stops any MoveToLevel, Step, MoveToLevelWithOnOff, StepWithOnOff in progress.

actions: for each bit i in OptionsBitmap: if StopWithOnOff.OptionsMask[i] == 1 then tempOptions[i] := StopWithOnOff.OptionsOverride[i] else tempOptions[i] := Options[i]
if process_Options_result.allowExecution == false then exit transition
transitions.timing_requirements: Stops any Move, MoveWithOnOff in progress.

actions: if best == null then { LastCommandStatus := CONSTRAINT_ERROR; /* send_default_response in protocol */ exit transition }
transitions.timing_requirements: Assignment is conceptually immediate; no RemainingTime semantics for frequency.
Error is instantaneous; no attribute value change.

actions: LastCommandStatus := SUCCESS /* or status determined by new command */
transitions.timing_requirements: ErrorState is purely logical and cleared on next processed command.

actions: if StartUpCurrentLevel == 0 then CurrentLevel := DeviceMinLevel else if StartUpCurrentLevel == null then CurrentLevel := PreviousLevelBeforePowerLoss else CurrentLevel := clamp(StartUpCurrentLevel, DeviceMinLevel, DeviceMaxLevel)
transitions.timing_requirements: Applies only on power-up that is not due to an OTA firmware update or soft reboot.
Scene recall is conceptually instantaneous for these attributes.

actions: if FeatureMap.FQ == 1 then SceneTableEntry.LevelControl.CurrentFrequency := CurrentFrequency else SceneTableEntry.LevelControl.CurrentFrequency := scene_extension_placeholder
transitions.timing_requirements: Scene store occurs when a higher-layer Scenes command is processed.

attributes_used: CurrentLevel (id 0x0000, type uint8, qualities: S N X Q, access R V)
RemainingTime (id 0x0001, type uint16, quality Q, access R V)
MinLevel (id 0x0002, type uint8, access R V)
MaxLevel (id 0x0003, type uint8, access R V)
CurrentFrequency (id 0x0004, type uint16, qualities P S Q, access R V, conformance FQ)
MinFrequency (id 0x0005, type uint16, access R V, conformance FQ)
MaxFrequency (id 0x0006, type uint16, access R V, conformance FQ)
OnOffTransitionTime (id 0x0010, type uint16, access RW VO)
OnLevel (id 0x0011, type uint8, quality X, access RW VO)
OnTransitionTime (id 0x0012, type uint16, quality X, access RW VO)
OffTransitionTime (id 0x0013, type uint16, quality X, access RW VO)
DefaultMoveRate (id 0x0014, type uint8, quality X, access RW VO)
Options (id 0x000F, type OptionsBitmap, access RW VO)
StartUpCurrentLevel (id 0x4000, type uint8, qualities XN, access RW VM)
FeatureMap (id 0xFFFD, type map32, contains OO, LT, FQ bits)
LastCommandStatus (logical, not a Matter attribute; used here for FSM error tracking)
scene_behaviors: CurrentLevel is scene-capable and SHALL be stored in the Scenes cluster Scene Table ExtensionFieldSetStruct when the Scenes server cluster is present.
CurrentFrequency is scene-capable when FeatureMap.FQ == 1 and SHALL be stored similarly; if FQ is not supported, the field SHALL exist in the scene table but be ignored on recall.
On scene recall, stored values of CurrentLevel and, if supported, CurrentFrequency are applied atomically.
Fabric sensitivity is false for these attributes; scenes apply fabric-independently unless constrained by Scenes cluster rules.

definitions.definition: The effective minimum level the device can assume, derived from MinLevel and implementation-specific hardware constraints.
definitions.usage_context: Clamping target levels for Move/Step/MoveToLevel commands and for OnOff linkage when CurrentLevel equals DeviceMinLevel.

definitions.definition: The effective maximum level the device can assume, derived from MaxLevel if present or from type constraints (≤ 254) and hardware limits.
definitions.usage_context: Clamping upward movements and as the target of Move(up) or MoveWithOnOff(up) commands.

definitions.definition: A logical procedure that interprets the temporary Options bitmap (including ExecuteIfOff and CoupleColorTempToLevel bits) and decides whether the level command is allowed to execute and whether any coupled color-temperature behavior is required.
definitions.usage_context: Guards for all commands using OptionsMask/OptionsOverride; output field allowExecution determines if the command shall be applied.

definitions.definition: An internal FSM variable encoding which type of transition is currently in progress (MoveToLevel, Step, Move, MoveToLevelWithOnOff, MoveWithOnOff, StepWithOnOff, or null).
definitions.usage_context: State invariants and TimerTick/AutoStop guards to differentiate behaviors and OnOff linkages.

definitions.definition: The final CurrentLevel to be reached at the end of a timed transition.
definitions.usage_context: LevelTransition state; used on TimerTick_100ms when RemainingTime reaches 0 to finalize CurrentLevel.

definitions.definition: Direction of continuous move (Up or Down) for Move/MoveWithOnOff commands.
Effective rate in units per second for continuous movement as determined by Rate argument or DefaultMoveRate, adjusted for device capabilities.
definitions.usage_context: Actions for Move/MoveWithOnOff and for internal update_CurrentLevel_progressively().

definitions.definition: Conceptual internal timer event fired every 100 ms, used to decrement RemainingTime (expressed in 0.1 s units).
definitions.usage_context: Transitions that update RemainingTime and finalize timed transitions to Idle.

definitions.definition: Conceptual internal events fired when a continuous move reaches DeviceMinLevel or DeviceMaxLevel.
definitions.usage_context: Transitions that stop LevelContinuousMove and optionally update OnOff in MoveWithOnOff mode.

definitions.definition: Abstract function that updates CurrentLevel along a chosen trajectory between start and target based on elapsed fraction of RemainingTime and device rate capabilities.
Abstract function selecting the closest frequency the device can generate to the requested target; returns null if no approximable frequency exists.
definitions.usage_context: MoveToClosestFrequency command actions and ErrorConstraint guard.

definitions.definition: Abstract function that adjusts the On/Off cluster's GlobalSceneControl attribute when Level Control operations cause OnOff state changes.
definitions.usage_context: Actions for transitions that change OnOff as a result of level commands with On/Off variants.

definitions.definition: Options bitmap bit 0; when 0, most Level Control commands do not affect the device when OnOff is FALSE, except the 'WithOnOff' variants which may turn it on; when 1, commands can change CurrentLevel even when the device is off.
definitions.usage_context: process_Options(tempOptions) and behavioral differences in the state change table for lighting.

definitions.definition: Options bitmap bit 1; when 1, Level Control commands may trigger color temperature changes in the Color Control cluster according to external rules.
definitions.usage_context: process_Options(tempOptions) for lighting applications when Color Control cluster is present.

references.name: On/Off Cluster
references.description: Provides OnOff attribute, OnLevel, OnOffTransitionTime and GlobalSceneControl; tightly coupled when Level Control has OnOff (OO) feature.

references.name: Color Control Cluster
references.description: May be coupled via Options.CoupleColorTempToLevel for lighting applications.

references.name: Scenes Management server cluster
references.description: If present, stores Level Control attributes CurrentLevel and CurrentFrequency in Scene Table ExtensionFieldSetStruct.

references.name: FeatureMap
references.description: Global attribute whose bits (OO, LT, FQ) indicate support for On/Off coupling, lighting semantics, and frequency control.

references.name: ClusterRevision
references.description: Global attribute indicating Level Control cluster revision; must match the highest defined revision.

references.name: ZLO 1.0
references.description: Zigbee Light Link profile reference used for aligning Level Control behavior; not directly modeled but informs lighting semantics.
